test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_optimize_json_all_paths_subscript (json JSON, map_json Map(String, String) ALIAS JSONAllPathsWithValues(json)::Map(String, String)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_optimize_json_all_paths_subscript SELECT materialize({json_sample}::JSON) FROM numbers(1000000)
test.query: SELECT count() FROM test_optimize_json_all_paths_subscript WHERE JSONAllPathsWithValues(json)['b'] = 'hello' FORMAT Null
SELECT JSONAllPathsWithValues(json)['a'] FROM test_optimize_json_all_paths_subscript FORMAT Null
SELECT count() FROM test_optimize_json_all_paths_subscript WHERE JSONAllPathsWithValues(json)::Map(String, String)['b'] = 'hello' FORMAT Null
SELECT count() FROM test_optimize_json_all_paths_subscript WHERE map_json['b'] = 'hello' FORMAT Null
